user_query: I'm organizing a music-themed event and I need to create a promotional flyer. Can you suggest some catchy phrases and quotes related to music? Also, provide me with the U.K. Songs chart information to feature the current popular songs.

TaskList.description: Gather catchy phrases and quotes related to music for the promotional flyer.
Retrieve the current U.K. Songs chart information to include popular songs in the flyer.
